mapper.select: SELECT bc.bias_correction_id AS biasCorrectionId, bc.evaluator_id AS evaluatorId, e.employee_name AS evaluatorName, bc.qualitative_evaluation_id AS qualitativeEvaluationId, bc.bias_type AS biasType, bc.evaluator_avg AS evaluatorAvg, bc.company_avg AS companyAvg, bc.alpha_bias AS alphaBias, bc.original_score AS originalScore, bc.corrected_score AS correctedScore, bc.detected_at AS detectedAt FROM bias_correction bc JOIN employee e ON e.employee_id = bc.evaluator_id ORDER BY bc.detected_at DESC

SELECT af.flag_id AS flagId, af.employee_id AS employeeId, e.employee_name AS employeeName, af.production_speed_rank AS productionSpeedRank, af.safety_keyword_rank AS safetyKeywordRank, af.penalty_coefficient AS penaltyCoefficient, af.target_year AS targetYear, af.target_period AS targetPeriod, af.is_active AS isActive FROM anti_gaming_flag af JOIN employee e ON e.employee_id = af.employee_id ORDER BY af.target_year DESC, af.target_period DESC

SELECT tier_config_id AS tierConfigId, tier_config_tier AS tier, tier_config_promotion_point AS tierConfigPromotionPoint FROM tier_config WHERE is_active = TRUE AND is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY FIELD(tier_config_tier, 'S', 'A', 'B', 'C')

SELECT e1.evaluation_weight_config_id AS evaluationWeightConfigId, e1.tier_group AS tierGroup, e1.category_code AS categoryCode, e1.weight_percent AS weightPercent FROM evaluation_weight_config e1 WHERE e1.is_active = TRUE AND e1.is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY FIELD(e1.tier_group, 'SA', 'BC'), e1.category_code

SELECT tier_config_id AS tierConfigId, tier_config_tier AS tier, tier_config_promotion_point AS tierConfigPromotionPoint, is_active AS active, is_deleted AS deleted, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM tier_config ORDER BY created_at DESC, tier_config_id DESC

SELECT evaluation_weight_config_id AS evaluationWeightConfigId, tier_group AS tierGroup, category_code AS categoryCode, weight_percent AS weightPercent, is_active AS active, is_deleted AS deleted, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM evaluation_weight_config ORDER BY created_at DESC, evaluation_weight_config_id DESC
